title: Senior Commercial Executive (Chartering & Operations)
description:
Chartering & Commercial Operations

  • Execute chartering activities across spot, COA, and time charter fixtures in accordance with contractual terms, company strategy, and approval frameworks.

  • Prepare, review, negotiate, and administer charter party agreements and related commercial documentation.

  • Act as the primary commercial point of contact for assigned vessels, charterers, brokers, and vessel managers.

  • Monitor compliance with charter party terms and escalate deviations or commercial risks where necessary.

Commercial Performance & Reporting

  • Monitor vessel utilisation, hire performance, off-hire events, and key commercial KPIs.

  • Prepare regular commercial performance reports and analysis for management review.

  • Maintain a rolling fleet deployment outlook, including scenario analysis where relevant.

  • Support assessment of commercial exposure, risks, and mitigation measures.

Stakeholder & Market Interface

  • Liaise with brokers, charterers, and commercial counterparties on operational and commercial matters.

  • Support relationship management with customers and commercial partners.

  • Assist with market analysis, freight benchmarking, and competitor monitoring.

Business Support & Development

  • Support business development initiatives, including preparation of commercial proposals and market assessments.

  • Provide commercial input for internal discussions on fleet deployment, new projects, and operational planning.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in a commercial, chartering, or operations role within the shipping industry.

  • Experience with tanker vessels is preferred

  • Good working knowledge of shipping contracts (e.g. Charter Parties), industry regulations, and commercial best practices.

  • Strong understanding of shipping economics, freight rate calculations, and market dynamics.

  • Effective negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com


EA License No.: 13C6305

Reg. No.: R23117344 (Tiong Tian Ho)

For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.

We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Employment Passes
